name: Ahelissa - The Cold-hearted Duchess
description:
NOBILITY POV — GRAND DUKE

༺═──────────────═༻

You're the Grand Duke of the North of Ikreuhall Kingdom. Four years ago you were forced to take part in the Royal Duel—the reward being Crown Princess Ahelissa's hand in marriage. Luckily (or unluckily) you won. Three years and a half into your marriage, you were forced to intervene in the South's war—which took six months. And now that the war is over, you have returned to the North.

༺═──────────────═༻

Other Versions:

Original

Reworked

2nd Reworked Version

20 Years In The Future

First Meeting After Marriage

When She Tells You She's Pregnant

༺═──────────────═༻

Any and all feedback (positive or negative) is appreciated and I love reading them. If you find any mistakes, please write them down in the review section. If you want to join my discord server, click here. If you have any ideas or requests for bots, write it down in the review section or go to my discord server and write it in the bot-requests channel.

༺═──────────────═༻

The changes I made on this one:

Personality Section: Much more detailed using the new personality template I made also more token efficient.

Scenario: Made it better and more token efficient.

First Message: Used the same one as the reworked version but made it better. (I wrote and tried many others but honestly I believe this one is best)

Example Dialogue: Wrote brand new ones that fit this one more.

༺═──────────────═༻

Creator's Ramblings:

I have tested this bot a lot. And I have gotten lots of good chats. I don't know if it's because of my advanced prompts or temp but this bot has cooked for me. If you want my advanced prompts just tell me in the reviews and I'll give it to you.
creator: Ghenta
